description: A business built around teaching, explaining, coaching, or helping users learn or improve a skill.
best_for: Users with subject knowledge or strong explanatory ability
Users comfortable with communication and trust-building
Users who can identify a specific learner pain point
bad_for: Users with no identifiable expertise or teachable framework
evaluation_points: Does the target learner have a painful and specific need?
Why would they trust this provider?
Can the offer be narrowed to one result?
